title: Payday Super webinar recording is now available
description: Watch the recording for more information on what SMSFs need to do to prepare for 1 July 2026.
keywords: Payday, super, webinar, recording, 1, July, 2026, information, SMSF, self-managed, fund, funds, SuperStream, updated, guidance

content_blocks.text: A recording of our Payday Super webinar from 16 February is now available.
Media: Payday Super webinar recording for SMSF https://tv.ato.gov.au/ato-tv/media?v=bi9or7or34mzem External Link ( Duration: 51:11)
We encourage you to watch the session to ensure you have the most up-to-date guidance on how to prepare for Payday Super from 1 July 2026.

items: Key changes that super funds and SMSFs need to implement.
Practical steps you can take to support a smooth transition to Payday Super.

content_blocks.text: Remember all super funds that receive super guarantee contributions from unrelated employers are expected to be ready to comply with the updated requirements from 1 July 2026.
Updated SuperStream and Fund Validation Service documentation is available on the ATO software developers website External Link .
For more information, go to Paydaysuper .
Looking for the latest news for SMSFs? You can stay up to date by visiting our SMSF newsroom and subscribing External Link to our monthly SMSF newsletter.

content_text:
A recording of our Payday Super webinar from 16 February is now available.
Media: Payday Super webinar recording for SMSF https://tv.ato.gov.au/ato-tv/media?v=bi9or7or34mzem External Link ( Duration: 51:11)
We encourage you to watch the session to ensure you have the most up-to-date guidance on how to prepare for Payday Super from 1 July 2026.
The webinar covers:
- Key changes that super funds and SMSFs need to implement.
- Practical steps you can take to support a smooth transition to Payday Super.
- Updates to SuperStream.
Remember all super funds that receive super guarantee contributions from unrelated employers are expected to be ready to comply with the updated requirements from 1 July 2026.
Updated SuperStream and Fund Validation Service documentation is available on the ATO software developers website External Link .
For more information, go to Paydaysuper .
Looking for the latest news for SMSFs? You can stay up to date by visiting our SMSF newsroom and subscribing External Link to our monthly SMSF newsletter.
